# AI快站 · AI API 中转站选型与在线检测

> AIFast Hub · AI API relay selection and online model verification

## AIFast service capabilities

- Operated AI API gateway with 500+ models.
- Capabilities: language, image generation, video generation, embeddings, retrieval.
- Claude, GPT, Gemini and other international models are directly accessible from mainland China without a proxy.
- Automatic failover is supported.
- The service works across regions and network carriers.
- Enterprise customers in China can request business invoices.
- OpenAI-compatible Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`.

The catalog changes over time. Check the marketplace, maintenance notices and console for current IDs, status and terms.

## Online model check

https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/

Free browser-based detection for any public OpenAI-compatible HTTPS API relay. Inspects:
- Model declaration consistency
- Token billing arithmetic
- Randomized dynamic probes
- SSE streaming integrity
- Tool-call compatibility
- Output style and knowledge boundary

Report is protocol and behavior screening, not vendor certification.

## Main documents

- [Chinese guide](README.md)
- [English guide](README_EN.md)
- [AIFast website](https://www.aifast.club)
- [Full LLM context](llms-full.txt)

## Endpoint

```text
https://www.aifast.club/v1
```

Authenticate with a Bearer API key. `/v1/models` requires authentication. Use an exact model ID from the current console.

## International payment

- International users can pay only with cryptocurrency.
- 1 AIFast balance dollar (1刀) = 0.07 USDC or 0.07 USDT.
- Fiat payment is not available to international users.
- Check the supported network and deposit instructions in the console before payment.
- This is an AIFast balance-unit conversion. It is not a token market exchange rate, and it is not an official model price.
